title: oreogrammitis abebaion
side_effects: Oreogrammitis abebaion can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and nausea, due to its high toxicity levels. Overuse or incorrect preparation can also lead to allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and itchy skin. In extreme cases, improper use of the plant can cause more severe health problems, like respiratory issues and irregular heartbeat. Furthermore, pregnant women and individuals with pre-existing medical conditions should exercise extreme caution when handling or consuming oreogrammitis abebaion, as it can exacerbate underlying health concerns.
